articles.title: Telangana Sizzles Under Extreme Heat As IMD Issues Red Alert - WION
articles.search_term: ("heat advisory" OR "heat action plan" OR "heat alert" OR "IMD warning" OR "IMD alert" OR "red alert" OR "orange alert" OR "yellow alert" OR "NDMA advisory" OR "cooling shelter" OR "relief measures" OR "heat compensation" OR "severe weather warning") Telangana
articles.full_text:
Published: May 20, 2026, 19:31 IST | Updated: May 20, 2026, 19:31 IST
Several districts across Telangana are reeling under an intense heatwave, with temperatures crossing 45 degrees Celsius in many areas. The India Meteorological Department has issued a red alert, warning residents about severe heat conditions and possible health risks. Adilabad recorded some of the highest temperatures in the state as authorities urged people to avoid unnecessary outdoor activity, stay hydrated and take precautions against heatstroke.
